jsonLd.title: PayU is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at PayU are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PayU:
PayU is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
